failure_modes.title: Stale market data served to decision engine
IV history file missing or corrupted for A2 symbol
failure_modes.detection: IV rank = 0 or IV environment = unknown

failure_modes.title: Citrini positions file stale
mitigations: Agent 8 CFO reminder every weekly review

failure_modes.title: Claude API timeout causes empty decision
mitigations: All Claude calls wrapped in try/except

failure_modes.title: Batch API returns empty responses for weekly review agents 1-4
failure_modes.detection: weekly review report missing agent 1-4 sections

failure_modes.title: Model tier escalation triggers cache miss storm
failure_modes.detection: cost spike in spine; high cache_creation_input_tokens

failure_modes.title: PDT floor check bypassed
mitigations: PDT check in bot.py AND order_executor.py (dual-layer)
failure_modes.detection: trade submitted with equity < $26,000 (impossible under dual-layer check)

failure_modes.title: Bracket stop-loss child invisible to exit_manager
failure_modes.detection: exit_manager logs tp_only status; position without stop_price

failure_modes.title: Dynamic/intraday position held overnight
mitigations: reconciliation.py checks DYNAMIC tier at session boundary
failure_modes.detection: DYNAMIC position in overnight session log

failure_modes.title: Market order fails on crypto GTC requirement
mitigations: order_executor.py hardcodes GTC for symbols containing /
failure_modes.detection: Alpaca rejection with TimeInForce not valid for asset

failure_modes.title: Options structure leg submission fails midway
decisions.json grows beyond rolling limit
mitigations: memory.py trims to last 500 decisions on each save
failure_modes.detection: File size > 2MB; OOM in VPS logs

failure_modes.title: ChromaDB protobuf conflict disables vector memory
failure_modes.detection: [ChromaDB] disabled for this process warning in log

failure_modes.title: Annex module writes to prod data directory
mitigations: annex sandbox contract enforced by convention
failure_modes.detection: unexpected writes to data/analytics/ from annex module

failure_modes.title: Shadow flag enables shadow module in prod pipeline
mitigations: # SHADOW MODULE header in all shadow files
failure_modes.detection: ring=shadow module appearing in prod spine records

failure_modes.title: VPS disk fills due to log rotation failure
Scheduler misses Sunday weekly review
mitigations: run_weekly_review.py manual trigger documented in runbook

failure_modes.title: Claude self-references or breaks fourth wall in trade output
mitigations: system prompt instructs institutional trading desk persona
failure_modes.detection: Agent 10 flags self-reference or AI language in output

failure_modes.title: Model recommends position violating watchlist exclusion
mitigations: risk_kernel validates all symbols against watchlist
failure_modes.detection: rejected orders with symbol not in watchlist reason in trades.jsonl
